evals.prompt: Here's my latest weekly report in output/stocks/. Evaluate my portfolio — what should I do this week?
evals.expected_output: Prioritized action list grounded in the report: closes, the true post-close cash %, buy-signal quality calls, options, and the biggest lever.

evals.prompt: Why did the watchlist come back empty in this week's stocks report?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses false-empty (open_slots = max_positions - holdings counting to-be-closed names) vs genuine (quality floor / weak regime).

evals.prompt: The report says Add Core on HIMS. Is that a good buy?
evals.expected_output: Cross-horizon read: Acceleration via RSI-only branch (short-term) but negative 6-month rs = chasing a bounce; flags it as the weakest buy, notes avg_cost.
